column2: The Kosmographica project aims to create a unified temporal framework that integrates multiple dimensions of development across all scales of existence. This document presents samples of indexes meant as public source of record; organizing and cataloging time, from cosmic evolution to human cultural development. By synthesizing diverse developmental models into a coherent database architecture, we create a foundation for unprecedented historical understanding and pattern recognition.
Access all indexes using the sheet tabs below
Learn more at Kosmographica.com and Panentheon.com
